input.background: At time $x=0$, twenty identical units are put on test. Suppose that the lifetime probability density function of each unit with parameter $\lambda$ is given by $f(x)=\lambda e^{-\lambda x}$ for $x \geq 0, \lambda>0$. The quality manager then leaves the test facility unmonitored. On his return 24 h later, the manager immediately terminates the test after noticing that $y=15$ of the 20 units are still in operation (so five have failed).
input.question: Determine the maximum likelihood estimate of $\lambda$.
